name: stl-import-benchy
description: Load 3DBenchy STL via import pipeline, render as primitive-fit SDF from 4 angles. (2026-06-11: broken since authoring — a bare top-level 'await' setup command is a SyntaxError under Runtime.evaluate without replMode, crashing every run as 'Uncaught'; wrapped in an async IIFE. STL-load failures now throw instead of returning an error string the runner ignored.)

commands: (async () => { try { await window.__canaryLoadSTLFromUrl('/3dbenchy.stl'); return 'STL_OK'; } catch(e) { throw new Error('STL load failed: ' + e.message + ' ||| STACK: ' + e.stack); } })()
